release_notes: Probe rewritten from --dump-dom to Chrome DevTools Protocol. The new chrome bundle tomeanty.6 (is_official_build=true rebuild) does not exit cleanly under --dump-dom — empirically verified on Cloud4Box that chrome opens DevTools port, navigation works, Runtime.evaluate returns the full sannysoft DOM. New probe spawns chrome with --remote-debugging-port, waits for the port, drives DOM extraction via chrome-remote-interface. Drops PowerShell wrapper, 8.3 short-path workaround, --single-process and --dump-dom flags. Requires chrome bundle tomeanty.6 (auto-updated via chrome-manifest).
